rationale: The citing paper references Gielens (2012) in the introduction and literature review for specific empirical claims: premium private labels can raise category sales, and national-brand new products can slow national-brand share decline. It then states its model is developed in keeping with this stream and explicitly incorporates those issues (multitier private labels and manufacturers introducing additional national brands). So the citation plays a meaningful framing and setup role, not a passing mention.
relation_description: The citing paper uses Gielens (2012) as empirical grounding for key competitive phenomena and builds a theoretical channel model around those phenomena. In that sense, the cited paper provides an empirical foundation for the citing paper's conceptual setup and propositions.
